prevalence.trend: stable; seasonal peaks with school attendance

burden.dalyPerCapita: low; high absenteeism and antibiotic use

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical assessment; rapid antigen test/culture when available to guide antibiotics

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High for symptom relief; antibiotic stewardship limited by testing access

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Clinical diagnosis common; limited access to rapid testing
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Supportive care for viral; penicillin/amoxicillin for suspected streptococcal infection
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Antibiotic overuse and limited diagnostic confirmation
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Low-cost antibiotics and primary care access in many regions
